offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, late notifications about upcoming invoices cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of contract milestones and invoices.
problem: Late notifications about upcoming invoices can lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try manual entry and email notifications for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
